title: Update dependencies regularly
body: Do not let dependencies fall years behind. Update monthly or use Dependabot/Renovate for automated PRs. Run your test suite after every update. Pin major versions in package.json and review changelogs for breaking changes before upgrading.
code:
# Update all dependencies to latest compatible versions
npm update

# Check what is outdated
npm outdated

# Update a specific package to latest major version
npm install react@latest react-dom@latest

# Run tests after updating to catch breaking changes
npm test
